Who is Cedric?

I'm a Year 2 Computer Science student at Mount Kigali University, building at the intersection of cybersecurity and full-stack development — with one mission: put Rwanda on the global tech map.

From blue-team SOC analysis to building AI-powered tools and React web apps, I move fast, think in systems, and ship things that actually work. Targeting SOC Analyst and Penetration Tester roles — locally and remotely.
